'''dhawomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:drab|drab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:drab|drab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhawomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæwemeth|dhæwemeth]] || [[word:dhæwemej|dhæwemej]] || [[word:dhæwemesh|dhæwemesh]] || [[word:dhæweme|dhæweme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhawowomoth|dhawowomoth]] || [[word:dhawowomoj|dhawowomoj]] || [[word:dhawowomosh|dhawowomosh]] || [[word:dhawowomo|dhawowomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhawomoth|dhawomoth]] || [[word:dhawomoj|dhawomoj]] || [[word:dhawomosh|dhawomosh]] || [[word:dhawomo|dhawomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhawofmofth|dhawofmofth]] || [[word:dhawofmofj|dhawofmofj]] || [[word:dhawofmofsh|dhawofmofsh]] || [[word:dhawofmof|dhawofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhawomotho|dhawomotho]] || [[word:dhawomojo|dhawomojo]] || [[word:dhawomosho|dhawomosho]] || [[word:dhawomoko|dhawomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhawomoth|dhawomoth]] || [[word:dhawomoj|dhawomoj]] || [[word:dhawomosh|dhawomosh]] || [[word:dhawomo|dhawomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhawomothol|dhawomothol]] || [[word:dhawomojol|dhawomojol]] || [[word:dhawomoshol|dhawomoshol]] || [[word:dhawomokol|dhawomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhawomoothotho|dhawomoothotho]] || [[word:dhawomoojojo|dhawomoojojo]] || [[word:dhawomooshosho|dhawomooshosho]] || [[word:dhawomooko|dhawomooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhawomothon|dhawomothon]] || [[word:dhawomojon|dhawomojon]] || [[word:dhawomoshon|dhawomoshon]] || [[word:dhawomokon|dhawomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhawomothooro|dhawomothooro]] || [[word:dhawomojooro|dhawomojooro]] || [[word:dhawomoshooro|dhawomoshooro]] || [[word:dhawomokooro|dhawomokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
